thirdpartycookie.explanation:
Because of how your internet browser works, some browsers with strict Third Party Cookie policies, or those blocking YouTube.com cookies may find it difficult to log into / use Youtube chat.

You can fix this by whitelisting Youtube.com in Third Party Cookie blockers, or decreasing your cookie security / privacy level for Holodex.net.

We included some websites that provide more information on how to do this.
thirdpartycookie.alertText: Your browser privacy setting is making it impossible to log-in to Youtube chat. Click here for more info

library.exportYTExplanation:
The youtube playlist created by this feature is unlisted and may be deleted by Youtube.
Because Youtube's feature incompleteness, you need to do the following to save the unlisted Youtube playlist to your account.
library.exportYTInstructions:
Step 1: Play the youtube playlist, and change the player UI into mini-player.

Step 2: Pick any video and add it to the Queue.

Step 3: The Playlist is now save-able. Click save to save it.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.ytchatHeader: My Youtube Chat is not logged in!
faq.ytchatContent: Please disable the browser security feature known as 3rd Party Cookies blocking, or whitelist this website and youtube.com to allow 3rd Party Cookies.
faq.ytchatFirefox: Firefox instructions, other browsers may be similar.
faq.autoplayContent: Please google how to enable autoplay for your browser.
faq.musicPlayer: Music Player doesn't work well on Mobile Devices!
faq.musicPlayerContent: For most iOS devices, you cannot turn off the screen or close Safari while playing Holodex music. This restriction may or may not apply to Android devices (depends on device). Please give us feedback on discord if you have any idea how to produce a better playback system.
faq.videoLinkage: How do I make sure that videos are linked properly to vtubers?
faq.videoLinkageContent: All information is parsed from the video description. If you are clipping a stream, please make sure to link the official stream. If you are clipping fan made content (eg. from bilibili), just make sure to link the official youtube channels of relevant vtubers. If you do not link any vtuber channels, then we will not show that clip on holodex, as all clips require linkage to a vtuber known to holodex.
faq.quitHolodex: I'm a subber and I would like to have my channel removed from Holodex
faq.quitHolodexContent: Sad to see you go :(, please let me know if there's any issue I can help you with. If you would still like to have it removed, please send us a message on Discord.

Contents.0: Favorites are a way to stay on top of your favorite vtubers, you can add your favorite channels by clicking the heart icon on the
Contents.1: page. Please note that favoriting subbers is currently not supported, but you should still consider subscribing and supporting them in other ways!

disappear.title: My favorites list disappeared / I cannot favorite

contents.0: Please make sure you are logged in and visit the channels favorites tab to force a refresh.

mobile.title: Is there an Android/iOS app for Holodex?

content.summary: We are working on it! In the mean time, please use the "Add to Home" feature on your browser. We have tuned it a lot to behave like an app

android.0: Android Chrome: Navigate to the site, click the three dots
android.1: on the top right and find "Add to Home Screen".

ios.0: iOS Safari: Navigate to the site on your phone, click the square with arrow pointing up
ios.1: at the bottom of safari, and click "Add to Home Screen"

contents.0: MugenClips, or infinite clips, is a watch along party where people on the site can watch a constantly rotating variety of clips uploaded by the many community translation channels

subber.title: I'm a subber and can't find my channel or clips on Holodex

contents.0: Please check on the Channels page to see if you are listed as a subber, if not please fill out
contents.2: , and we will add you manually. If you are already on the list, please make sure your video descriptions have the correct youtube source/channel links.

feedback.title: I have feedback/want to contribute to this project

contents.0: All help and ideas are welcome! The UI and Backend are both available for contribution, although only the UI is open source currently. Please contact us on discord to gain access to backend source, or simply chat about your ideas.

Our self-hosted server is a 28-core 60GB RAM machine that take about $60 USD / mo to run, and we're looking to expanding more and more in our feature set, so we've started a Ko-fi to cover Server costs. (We also have a Patreon, but we like the Ko-fi better.)

You can also support Holodex by giving us feedback and supportive messages on twitter, helping us translate via Crowdin, as well as contributing to our data store of songs. Even timing a stream for funny parts, and commenting that on the original stream is great help!

about.gdprContent: A Google Analytics cookie is used to track pageviews for our analytical purposes. After login, we associate your social media account username and ID with your favorites. This data may include your Email (for Google), Discord ID, or Twitter handle respectively.
about.gdprDeletion: For deletion of your user data, please contact us on discord!
about.feedbackHtml:
You can create an issue in the Github Issue Tracker or find the Holodex team on Discord

Reddit: u/Rice_cakess

bookmarklet.title: Bookmarklets
bookmarklet.description: Drag these bookmarklets to your bookmark bar to open YouTube watch page in Holodex easily:

content.intro: This page explains what data Holodex handles and how third-party services are used.

firstParty.title: Holodex data
firstParty.collection: Holodex stores the account identifiers, favorites, settings, playlists, and editor actions needed to provide site features.
firstParty.voluntary: Most account data is created only when you sign in or use account features.
firstParty.access: You can access or update your user settings from your account menu.
firstParty.limitedUse: Holodex uses Google user data only for sign-in and account linking features.
firstParty.noPosting: Holodex does not post to your linked accounts.
firstParty.revoking: You can revoke third-party account access from the provider account settings.
firstParty.changes: This policy may change when site features or provider requirements change.

thirdParty.title: Third-party services
thirdParty.analyticsBody: Holodex may use analytics to understand site usage and reliability.
thirdParty.analyticsUse: Analytics data is used to improve performance, navigation, and stability.
thirdParty.embedsBody: YouTube and Twitch embeds are provided by those services and may use their own cookies and account state.
thirdParty.linksIntro: See these provider policies for details:
thirdParty.choicesBody: You can block third-party cookies or sign out of linked providers, though some embedded features may stop working.
thirdParty.contactBody: Contact the Holodex team through Discord or GitHub for privacy questions.
thirdParty.commitment: Holodex only asks for the access needed to run its features.

youtubeTerms.before: Use of embedded YouTube features is subject to the

Types.AddVtuber: Add a Vtuber ▶️ for Holodex to track the channel and clips.
Types.AddClipper: Add a clipping/subbing channel to Holodex

channelRequest.DirectContactDisclaimer: Feel free to leave your discord id, email or twitter. In case you need to be contacted (this info will stay private) so we can provide feedback. Only holodex administrators will see this information.
channelRequest.VtuberGroupHint: Which org / group does this vtuber belong to?
channelRequest.EnglishNameHint: Provide an English name if the channel name is not in English. Follow name-order conventions from the native locale of this vtuber (Natsuiro Matsuri), or a preferred EN brand name (Elu the Elf, Emma★August).
channelRequest.CommentsHint: Other comments you'd like to tell us.
channelRequest.VtuberRequirementText:
A minimum of 15K subscribers is required for independents. Vtubers as part of existing orgs will be accepted.

New Orgs will be created depending on the average subscriber count.

Twitch streamers must have an official YouTube channel to be indexed.

Any mention of "Past-Lives" / alternate identities will automatically be rejected.
channelRequest.ClipperRequirementText:
For clippers, it must be at least 2 months old and post regularly, or post more than 20 clips in one month. Spamming of short clips every day, posting only short <1min clips, or using unflattering thumbnails will all count against the channel. Content quality might be judged as well.

It's important to note that clippers should cite their sources via channel links, @Youtube channel mentions, and video links. Overciting (e.g. Linking to everyone at Nijisanji) creates work for Holodex editors, and underciting (no links) will make clips hidden.

Holodex contains algorithms to detect overciting and correct them automatically, but it may not always work perfectly. Clippers who overcite may be removed from platform to reduce noise.
channelRequest.DeletionRequirementText: Deletion should only be requested if you are the channel owner(s), please provide contact information so we can verify this.
channelRequest.DirectContactPlaceholder: Discord, email, or other contact method
